title: Dangote Decorated As Grand Ambassador Against Drug Abuse
description: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd), OFR led management officials of the Agency on a courtesy visit to the headquarters of Dangote Group in Lagos where he decorated the Presi
html: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd), OFR led management officials of the Agency on a courtesy visit to the headquarters of Dangote Group in Lagos where he decorated the President of the Group, Alhaji Aliko Dangote as War Against Drug Abuse, WADA, Grand Ambassador today Thursday 2nd June 2022
